responses: Hello! I am MindEase, your AI space for mental wellness reflection. How are you holding up today?
Goodbye. Please remember to be gentle with yourself. I am always here if you need to pause and reflect.

patterns: My heart is racing and I can't breathe
I feel a tight chest sensation
responses: It sounds like your body's fight-or-flight response is highly active right now. Let's ground ourselves: lower your shoulders, unclench your jaw, and lengthen your next exhale. You are safe in this physical space.

patterns: My mind won't stop racing with worry
I am terrified of the future
I feel an overwhelming sense of dread
I'm trapped in a worry loop
responses: Anxiety tends to pull our minds into future scenarios we cannot control. Let's try to gently bring your focus back to the present. What is one concrete thing you can see right in front of you?

patterns: I have been crying all day for no reason
I am so lonely and isolated
I feel miserable and deeply down
responses: Feeling empty or completely numb is an incredibly heavy weight to carry. Please know that you do not have to force positivity right now. Just getting through today is a profound victory.

patterns: I don't have the energy to get out of bed
I stopped caring about my hobbies
I've been isolating myself from friends
I can't concentrate on my classes
I have zero motivation to do anything anymore
responses: When depression saps your energy, even minor tasks can feel like climbing a mountain. Give yourself permission to do things poorly or slowly today. Taking care of yourself comes first.

patterns: I am completely exhausted by university assignments
I am burning out from exams
The academic pressure is too much
I feel like a failure because of my grades
I am physically and mentally drained from studying
responses: Academic burnout is completely valid, especially when balancing intensive course loads. Your fundamental worth is not tied to your GPA or productivity. Can you give yourself permission to step away from your desk for 15 minutes?

patterns: I don't want to live anymore
I want to end my life
I am planning to end it
responses: CRITICAL_OVERRIDE: Please know that you are not alone and there is support available right now. Please reach out to a professional or a helpline immediately. You can call or text 988 (The Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) for free, confidential, 24/7 support. Your life matters. Please connect with them.
